title: Looking to find a Monday.com expert with CRM automations/integrations

posts.author: annakolomeets123 (Anna Kolomeets)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently looking for a Monday.Com CRM specialist. We require someone who knows their way around monday.com who can:

  • Set up separate board views for different employees.
  • Make enough automations to allow for Leads, Accounts, Deals to be tracked from sales perspective on monday.com
  • Create Google Calendar automation from Monday.com
    If you are interested please get in contact with us.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @annakolomeets123 ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out. At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized CRM solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can assist you in setting up board views for each employee and develop a plan for a revised architecture that will help optimize your workflow and keep track of all processes from start to finish, automating as many actions as possible.

We also have a wealth of experience in creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your CRM by integrating with any other products you might use, such as Google Calendar.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @annakolomeets123 and welcome to the monday.com community forums! Using monday.com as a CRM is a use case we see all the time. So much so that we produced an end-to-end solution within the monday.com marketplace. The CarbonCRM Suite is made up of entirely native automations and integrations to give you the most control over your pipeline.

We can work with you to easily tie in Google Calendar and make this an all-inclusive CRM for your business. The CarbonWeb team enjoys working with users every day and I’d be happy to help out as best I can. If you’d like to see a demo you can schedule with me here: CRM Demo - Ricky

Good luck!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @annakolomeets123 !

Welcome to the monday.com community.

If you are looking for a monday.com specialist who knows their way around and can help you in CRM automation/integration with monday com, I would suggest you get in touch with seasoned professionals. By partnering with an expert, you can make automation for your leads, accounts, and Google Calendar. Besides this, a monday integrations expert can also help you integrate other useful applications such as MS Teams, Outlook, Salesforce, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Github, and more.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
